description: Ambedkar Jayanti on April 14th transcends mere remembrance, urging a deep dive into B.R. Ambedkar's enduring ideas on equality, access, and dignity. His fight against caste discrimination and his role in shaping the Indian Constitution remain profoundly relevant. The day calls for reflection on his vision and its continued impact on contemporary Indian society.

description: Opposition leader Suvendu Adhikari warned Muslim migrant workers in Nandigram that they might lose work in BJP-governed states after the assembly polls. He cited the presence of thousands of workers in Gujarat, Maharashtra, and Odisha, all ruled by the BJP. The TMC criticized Adhikari's remarks as threats and intimidation, vowing to report the matter to the Election Commission.

description: The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow stretch which is important for global trade flows, and is alone responsible for the transit of a fifth of the world’s oil supply. Asian economies like India and China source a big chunk of their crude oil, LPG, and LNG requirements via this strait.

Dianna Russini faces backlash after old comments on husband resurface
description: Dianna Russini faces mounting backlash after old podcast comments about her marriage resurfaced amid viral photos with Mike Vrabel. While both deny any wrongdoing, public reaction has blurred the line between personal humor and professional credibility. The Athletic has defended Russini, but an internal review signals the seriousness of the situation as scrutiny continues to grow.

title: Mike Vrabel faces backlash amid Dianna Russini hot tub scandal
description: New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel skipped a scheduled media session amid controversy involving Dianna Russini, following photos of them together in Arizona. While both denied any inappropriate relationship, Russini faces an internal review at The Athletic. Fans questioned Vrabel’s absence, calling it evasive, though some believe it was a strategic move to avoid distractions as the team focuses on upcoming draft preparations.

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
description: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
description: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.
